source_pr.title: *: change the way transfer handle.
source_pr.body:
Don't transfer handle if we don't need it, so remove rowMeta in selectResponse.
Implement it first on mock-tikv.
PTAL @hanfei1991 @shenli @zimulala

symptoms: r := tk.MustQuery("select * from select_order_test where id = 1 order by id limit 1 offset 0;") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: r := tk.MustQuery("select * from select_order_test where id = 1 order by id limit 1 offset 0;") (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: r := tk.MustQuery("select * from select_order_test where id = 1 order by id limit 1 offset 0;") (executor/executor_test.go)

files: distsql/distsql.go, distsql/new_distsql.go, executor/builder.go, executor/distsql.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/new_distsql.go, kv/kv.go, plan/column_pruning.go, plan/explain_test.go, plan/new_physical_plan_builder.go, plan/plan_to_pb.go, store/tikv/coprocessor.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/analyze.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/cop_handler.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/cop_handler_dag.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/executor.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/topn.go
